testcases.input: nums = [1,3,2,4,5] Output: 2 Explanation: - When i = 0, j = 1, k = 2, and l = 3, nums[i] < nums[k] < nums[j] < nums[l]. - When i = 0, j = 1, k = 2, and l = 4, nums[i] < nums[k] < nums[j] < nums[l]. There are no other quadruplets, so we return 2.
